requirement_topic.en: Lithium-Ion Cell and Battery Safety for Industrial Applications — Bulgaria / EU
requirement_topic.zh: 工业应用锂离子电芯与电池安全——保加利亚／欧盟
requirement_topic.zht: 工業應用鋰離子電芯與電池安全——保加利亞／歐盟

summary.en: EN IEC 62619:2022 sets safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries used in industrial applications, including BESS. It covers abuse testing (overcharge, over-discharge, short-circuit, thermal, crush), BMS requirements, and marking. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU requires harmonised standard compliance; EN IEC 62619 is listed in the LVD Official Journal as a harmonised standard. EN IEC 63056 covers secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in electrical energy storage systems. Bulgaria as an EU member state implements these directives directly.
summary.zh: EN IEC 62619:2022 规定了工业应用（含BESS）二次锂电芯与电池组的安全要求，涵盖滥用测试（过充、过放、短路、热冲击、挤压）、电池管理系统要求及标识。依据低电压指令2014/35/EU获取CE标志须符合相应协调标准；EN IEC 62619已列入低电压指令官方公报协调标准清单。EN IEC 63056规定用于电气储能系统的二次锂电芯与电池安全要求。保加利亚作为欧盟成员国直接执行上述指令。
summary.zht: EN IEC 62619:2022 規定工業應用（含BESS）二次鋰電芯與電池組的安全要求，涵蓋濫用測試（過充、過放、短路、熱衝擊、擠壓）、電池管理系統要求及標識。依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU取得CE標誌須符合相應協調標準；EN IEC 62619已列入低電壓指令官方公報協調標準清單。EN IEC 63056規定用於電氣儲能系統的二次鋰電芯與電池安全要求。保加利亞作為歐盟成員國直接執行上述指令。

summary.en: GB/T 36276-2023 (Electric Energy Storage Lithium-Ion Batteries) is a recommended Chinese national standard for lithium-ion batteries used in power energy storage systems. It specifies safety performance requirements including electrical, mechanical, environmental, and abuse tests for cells and battery packs, but its GB/T status means it is not itself the compulsory national requirement. China's compulsory cell and battery safety standard for electric energy storage is GB 44240-2024. Testing expectations may still reference GB/T 36276 in projects or procurement, but mandatory-status conclusions should be based on GB 44240-2024 and the applicable regulator or grid-operator requirements.
summary.zh: GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）是中国推荐性国家标准，适用于电力储能系统用锂离子电池，规定电芯及电池组的安全性能要求，包括电气、机械、环境及滥用测试。中国针对电力储能用电芯及电池安全的强制性标准为GB 44240-2024。
summary.zht: GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）是中國推薦性國家標準，適用於電力儲能系統用鋰離子電池，規定電芯及電池組的安全性能要求，包括電氣、機械、環境及濫用測試。中國針對電力儲能用電芯及電池安全的強制性標準為GB 44240-2024。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — recommended national standard for electric energy storage lithium-ion batteries
GB 44240-2024 — compulsory safety requirement for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 36276 / GB 44240 test protocols and pass/fail criteria differ from EN IEC 62619 in several areas: nail penetration test conditions, thermal runaway propagation testing (required by EN IEC 62619 Annex C, not directly equivalent), and BMS functional safety depth. EU importers require a Declaration of Conformity and technical file under LVD; Chinese test reports or certificates are not recognised by EU notified bodies as substitutes. Manufacturers must re-test to EN IEC 62619 / EN IEC 63056 at an EU-recognised lab and issue EU DoC. Additionally, EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 imposes due-diligence, carbon-footprint, and battery-passport requirements that have no Chinese equivalent.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 36276/GB 44240与EN IEC 62619在多项测试协议和判定准则上存在差异：针刺测试条件、热失控蔓延测试（EN IEC 62619附录C要求，未形成直接等同关系）、电池管理系统功能安全深度。欧盟进口商依据低电压指令须提供符合性声明及技术文件；中国检测报告或证书不被欧盟通知机构认可为替代依据。制造商仍须在欧盟认可实验室重新按EN IEC 62619/EN IEC 63056测试，并出具欧盟符合性声明。此外，欧盟电池法规（EU）2023/1542对尽职调查、碳足迹和电池护照的要求在中国法规中亦无对应。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 36276/GB 44240與EN IEC 62619在多項測試協議和判定準則上存在差異：針刺測試條件、熱失控蔓延測試（EN IEC 62619附錄C要求，未形成直接等同關係）、電池管理系統功能安全深度。歐盟進口商依據低電壓指令須提供符合性聲明及技術文件；中國檢測報告或證書不被歐盟公告機構認可為替代依據。製造商仍須在歐盟認可實驗室重新按EN IEC 62619/EN IEC 63056測試，並出具歐盟符合性聲明。此外，歐盟電池法規（EU）2023/1542對盡職調查、碳足跡和電池護照的要求在中國法規中亦無對應。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU required for market access in EU member states including Bulgaria; EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 applies from 2024 onward with phased obligations
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is the compulsory national cell/battery safety requirement; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended (GB/T) and may be referenced by projects or procurement

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36276-2023 or GB 44240-2024 evidence does not satisfy EU LVD requirements applicable in Bulgaria. Separate EN IEC 62619:2022 and/or EN IEC 63056:2020 testing at an EU-recognised laboratory and issuance of an EU Declaration of Conformity are required before placing BESS on the Bulgarian/EU market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36276-2023或GB 44240-2024证据不满足适用于保加利亚的欧盟低电压指令要求。在欧盟认可实验室完成EN IEC 62619:2022和/或EN IEC 63056:2020测试，并出具欧盟符合性声明，方可在保加利亚/欧盟市场销售BESS产品。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36276-2023或GB 44240-2024證據不滿足適用於保加利亞的歐盟低電壓指令要求。在歐盟認可實驗室完成EN IEC 62619:2022和/或EN IEC 63056:2020測試，並出具歐盟符合性聲明，方可在保加利亞/歐盟市場銷售BESS產品。

requirement_topic.en: Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Safety — System Level — Bulgaria / EU
requirement_topic.zh: 电池储能系统（BESS）整机安全——保加利亚／欧盟
requirement_topic.zht: 電池儲能系統（BESS）整機安全——保加利亞／歐盟

summary.en: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety requirements for grid-integrated electrical energy storage systems) defines system-level safety requirements for BESS connected to the grid, including hazard identification, risk assessment, thermal runaway propagation prevention, fire suppression, and installation safety. Under EU law, compliance with the essential safety requirements of LVD 2014/35/EU and Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 is mandatory; harmonised standards such as IEC/EN 62933-5-2 are voluntary and provide a presumption of conformity only when their references are published in the EU Official Journal (OJ). The EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 additionally imposes lifecycle, due-diligence, and carbon-footprint requirements on industrial batteries. Bulgaria implements all applicable EU directives and regulations without additional national derogations confirmed as of mid-2026.
summary.zh: IEC 62933-5-2:2020（电气储能系统——并网电气储能系统安全要求）规定BESS系统级安全要求，涵盖危害识别、风险评估、热失控蔓延防护、消防及安装安全。依据欧盟法律，遵守低电压指令2014/35/EU及电池法规（EU）2023/1542的基本安全要求属强制义务；IEC/EN 62933-5-2等协调标准属自愿采用，仅在其参考编号发布于欧盟官方公报（OJ）时，方可推定符合强制要求。欧盟电池法规（EU）2023/1542另对工业电池提出全生命周期、尽职调查及碳足迹要求。保加利亚执行所有适用欧盟指令和法规，截至2026年中无经确认的国家豁免条款。
summary.zht: IEC 62933-5-2:2020（電氣儲能系統——並網電氣儲能系統安全要求）規定BESS系統級安全要求，涵蓋危害識別、風險評估、熱失控蔓延防護、消防及安裝安全。依據歐盟法律，遵守低電壓指令2014/35/EU及電池法規（EU）2023/1542的基本安全要求屬強制義務；IEC/EN 62933-5-2等協調標準屬自願採用，僅在其參考編號發布於歐盟官方公報（OJ）時，方可推定符合強制要求。歐盟電池法規（EU）2023/1542另對工業電池提出全生命週期、盡職調查及碳足跡要求。保加利亞執行所有適用歐盟指令和法規，截至2026年中無經確認的國家豁免條款。

summary.en: GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electric Energy Storage Systems Connected to Power Systems) specifies system-level technical and safety requirements for grid-connected BESS in China, including electrical performance, protection, communication, and safety functions. It is a recommended (non-mandatory) national standard but is referenced in grid-connection agreements with State Grid and China Southern Power Grid, making it effectively mandatory for grid-connected projects. As of mid-2026, no Chinese national standard contains thermal runaway propagation prevention test requirements directly equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 Annex B.
summary.zh: GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）规定中国并网储能系统的系统级技术与安全要求，包括电气性能、保护、通信及安全功能。该标准为推荐性国家标准，但在国家电网和南方电网的并网协议中被引用，使其对并网项目实际上具有强制效力。截至2026年中，中国国家标准中尚无与IEC 62933-5-2附录B直接对应的热失控蔓延防护测试要求。
summary.zht: GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）規定中國並網儲能系統的系統級技術與安全要求，包括電氣性能、保護、通信及安全功能。該標準為推薦性國家標準，但在國家電網和南方電網的並網協議中被引用，使其對並網項目實際上具有強制效力。截至2026年中，中國國家標準中尚無與IEC 62933-5-2附錄B直接對應的熱失控蔓延防護測試要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34131-2023 — Battery Management System for Electric Energy Storage (supersedes GB/T 34131-2017; published and in force October 2023)

gap.en: IEC 62933-5-2 thermal runaway propagation prevention requirements (Annex B) and fire-suppression system mandates have no direct equivalent in Chinese national standards as of mid-2026. EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 imposes due-diligence, carbon footprint declaration, and battery passport requirements not present in Chinese regulation. Chinese exporters must conduct system-level risk assessment per IEC 62933-5-2 and obtain EU DoC; GB/T 36558 compliance reports are not accepted as EU/Bulgarian market-access evidence.
gap.zh: IEC 62933-5-2热失控蔓延防护要求（附录B）及消防系统强制规定在截至2026年中的中国国家标准中无直接对应。欧盟电池法规（EU）2023/1542对尽职调查、碳足迹声明及电池护照的要求在中国法规中亦无对应。中国出口商须按IEC 62933-5-2进行系统级风险评估并取得欧盟符合性声明；GB/T 36558合规报告不被接受为欧盟/保加利亚市场准入证明。
gap.zht: IEC 62933-5-2熱失控蔓延防護要求（附錄B）及消防系統強制規定在截至2026年中的中國國家標準中無直接對應。歐盟電池法規（EU）2023/1542對盡職調查、碳足跡聲明及電池護照的要求在中國法規中亦無對應。中國出口商須按IEC 62933-5-2進行系統級風險評估並取得歐盟符合性聲明；GB/T 36558合規報告不被接受為歐盟/保加利亞市場準入證明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — compliance with the essential requirements of LVD 2014/35/EU and EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 is legally required for EU market access in Bulgaria; IEC/EN 62933-5-2 is a voluntary harmonised standard providing presumption of conformity only when OJ-listed
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T) but effectively mandatory for grid-connection approval by State Grid / China Southern Power Grid

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36558 compliance does not satisfy EU requirements applicable in Bulgaria. EU market access requires CE marking and satisfaction of the essential safety requirements of LVD 2014/35/EU and Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542. EU Declaration of Conformity, technical file, and battery passport (from 18 February 2027) are all required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36558合规不满足适用于保加利亚的欧盟要求。进入欧盟/保加利亚市场须取得CE标志，并满足低电压指令2014/35/EU及电池法规（EU）2023/1542的基本安全要求。欧盟符合性声明、技术文件及电池护照（自2027年2月18日起）均为必须。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36558合規不滿足適用於保加利亞的歐盟要求。進入歐盟/保加利亞市場須取得CE標誌，並滿足低電壓指令2014/35/EU及電池法規（EU）2023/1542的基本安全要求。歐盟符合性聲明、技術文件及電池護照（自2027年2月18日起）均為必須。
